steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The histogram's rightmost bar covers the interval [200, 250). Any data point in that bar is at least 200 feet, so the maximum value in the dataset must be $\geq 200$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Check each answer choice against the constraint: the maximum must be at least 200. Only 218 satisfies $\geq 200$; all other choices fall below 200.
